title: Cast value to integer gives wrong result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_casting (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, decimal_value DECIMAL(5, 2), int_value INT);
UPDATE test_casting SET int_value = CAST(decimal_value AS UNSIGNED);
SELECT id, decimal_value, int_value FROM test_casting WHERE int_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT CAST(CAST(decimal_value AS DECIMAL(10, 2)) AS UNSIGNED) FROM test_casting WHERE decimal_value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Casting decimal values to integer produces incorrect results
